title: hieracium murorum subsp. percrenatum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. percrenatum is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, known for its medicinal and health benefits. It is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, eczema, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. Hieracium murorum subsp. percrenatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for maintaining overall well-being.
